nasb.text: “Now when the Lord brings you to the land of the Canaanite, as He swore to you and to your fathers, and gives it to you,

esv.text: “When the Lord brings you into the land of the Canaanites, as he swore to you and your fathers, and shall give it to you,

cnv.text: “日後，耶和華照著他向你和你的列祖所起的誓，把你領進迦南人之地，把這地賜給你之後，

ccb.text: “将来耶和华成就祂起誓给你们祖先的应许，领你们进入迦南人的土地，把那里赐给你们以后，
